question: List every pair of doctors that share the same specialty.
reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.doctor_name AS left_doctor, b.doctor_name AS right_doctor FROM doctors a JOIN doctors b ON a.specialty = b.specialty AND a.doctor_id < b.doctor_id

question: Which two doctors have an identical specialty? Show both names in each pair.
reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.doctor_name AS left_doctor, b.doctor_name AS right_doctor FROM doctors a JOIN doctors b ON a.specialty = b.specialty AND a.doctor_id < b.doctor_id

question: Find all distinct pairs of doctors with matching specialty values.

question: Show pairs of different doctors whose specialty is the same.

question: Who won the Most Valuable Player between 2000 and 2010? Show names and year.
reference_sql: SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, a.yearID FROM AwardsPlayers a JOIN People p ON a.playerID = p.playerID WHERE a.awardID = 'Most Valuable Player' AND a.yearID BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010

question: List Most Valuable Player winners from 2000 to 2010 with the season.
reference_sql: SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, a.yearID FROM AwardsPlayers a JOIN People p ON a.playerID = p.playerID WHERE a.awardID = 'Most Valuable Player' AND a.yearID BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010

question: Show first name, last name, and year for Most Valuable Player awards 2000-2010.
reference_sql: SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, a.yearID FROM AwardsPlayers a JOIN People p ON a.playerID = p.playerID WHERE a.awardID = 'Most Valuable Player' AND a.yearID BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010

question: Which players received the Most Valuable Player in the 2000-2010 window?
reference_sql: SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, a.yearID FROM AwardsPlayers a JOIN People p ON a.playerID = p.playerID WHERE a.awardID = 'Most Valuable Player' AND a.yearID BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010

question: Which Players were inducted into the Hall of Fame between 2000 and 2010? Show names and induction year.
reference_sql: SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, h.yearid FROM HallOfFame h JOIN People p ON h.playerID = p.playerID WHERE h.inducted = 'Y' AND h.category = 'Player' AND h.yearid BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010

question: List Hall of Fame Player inductees from 2000 through 2010.
reference_sql: SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, h.yearid FROM HallOfFame h JOIN People p ON h.playerID = p.playerID WHERE h.inducted = 'Y' AND h.category = 'Player' AND h.yearid BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010

reference_sql: SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, h.yearid FROM HallOfFame h JOIN People p ON h.playerID = p.playerID WHERE h.inducted = 'Y' AND h.category = 'Player' AND h.yearid BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010

question: Which 2010 teams did not win the World Series that year?
reference_sql: SELECT t.name FROM Teams t LEFT JOIN SeriesPost s ON t.teamID = s.teamIDwinner AND t.yearID = s.yearID AND s.round = 'WS' WHERE t.yearID = 2010 AND s.teamIDwinner IS NULL

question: List the names of 2010 teams without a 2010 World Series title.
reference_sql: SELECT t.name FROM Teams t LEFT JOIN SeriesPost s ON t.teamID = s.teamIDwinner AND t.yearID = s.yearID AND s.round = 'WS' WHERE t.yearID = 2010 AND s.teamIDwinner IS NULL

question: Show every team from 2010 that failed to win the World Series.
reference_sql: SELECT t.name FROM Teams t LEFT JOIN SeriesPost s ON t.teamID = s.teamIDwinner AND t.yearID = s.yearID AND s.round = 'WS' WHERE t.yearID = 2010 AND s.teamIDwinner IS NULL

question: List Canada sales orders with total due above 100000, plus the territory name.

question: For vendors with credit rating 1, list vendor, product, and standard price above 40.
reference_sql: SELECT v.Name, p.Name, pv.StandardPrice FROM ProductVendor pv JOIN Vendor v ON pv.BusinessEntityID = v.BusinessEntityID JOIN Product p ON pv.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE v.CreditRating = 1 AND pv.StandardPrice > 40

question: Which credit-rating-1 vendors supply products priced over 40?
reference_sql: SELECT v.Name, p.Name, pv.StandardPrice FROM ProductVendor pv JOIN Vendor v ON pv.BusinessEntityID = v.BusinessEntityID JOIN Product p ON pv.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE v.CreditRating = 1 AND pv.StandardPrice > 40

question: Show vendor name, product name, and price where the vendor rating is 1 and the standard price exceeds 40.
reference_sql: SELECT v.Name, p.Name, pv.StandardPrice FROM ProductVendor pv JOIN Vendor v ON pv.BusinessEntityID = v.BusinessEntityID JOIN Product p ON pv.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE v.CreditRating = 1 AND pv.StandardPrice > 40

question: List supplier/product pairs (rating 1) with standard price > 40.
reference_sql: SELECT v.Name, p.Name, pv.StandardPrice FROM ProductVendor pv JOIN Vendor v ON pv.BusinessEntityID = v.BusinessEntityID JOIN Product p ON pv.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE v.CreditRating = 1 AND pv.StandardPrice > 40

question: Which finished products never appear in sales order lines? Show the name.
reference_sql: SELECT p.Name FROM Product p LEFT JOIN SalesOrderDetail c ON c.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE c.ProductID IS NULL AND p.FinishedGoodsFlag = '1'

reference_sql: SELECT p.Name FROM Product p LEFT JOIN SalesOrderDetail c ON c.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE c.ProductID IS NULL AND p.FinishedGoodsFlag = '1'

reference_sql: SELECT p.Name FROM Product p LEFT JOIN SalesOrderDetail c ON c.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE c.ProductID IS NULL AND p.FinishedGoodsFlag = '1'
